description_long: This is a classic black top hat with a wide, flat brim and a tall, cylindrical crown. The hat is made of a glossy, smooth material, likely felt or satin, giving it a formal and elegant appearance. Inside the crown, a rectangular card is inserted, prominently displaying a stylized black rabbit head silhouette on a white background. The card is angled and partially protrudes from the hat, adding a whimsical, magician-like touch. The brim is broad and even, with a slight downward curve at the edges. The overall construction appears lightweight and hollow, suitable for wearing or use as a prop in performances.
description: A glossy black top hat with a wide brim and tall crown, featuring a card with a black rabbit head silhouette inserted inside. The hat has a formal, magician-like appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face of the hat with the card and rabbit head silhouette clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angled card and the depth of the hat's crown.
description_view_2: Rear oblique view showing the back of the card and the inner part of the brim.
description_view_3: Back view with the card mostly visible from the side and the open, hollow interior of the hat.
